projects.description: Build and ship the Studio Awesome Mix booking app so clients can easily view availability and book sessions.

projects.description: Build a lightweight system to identify and engage companies within ~2 miles of 1608 Argyle Ave that need ADR/audio post, and create a steady pipeline of local leads.

projects.name: MikeGullickson.com Author Site
projects.description: Design, build, and deploy a dedicated author site for Mike (mikegullickson.com) that showcases The Northern Star trilogy, The Seethe, world art, reviews, and an updated author bio.

projects.name: The Promise (Novel)
projects.description: Editorial development of Mike's finished fantasy/apocalyptic novel. Protagonist: Amal (they/them), a genetically engineered soldier — 'amalgamate' — navigating identity and survival at the end of the world. Key decisions: commit to Amal/they-them throughout, shed 'Adam' as the state-assigned name. Title: The Promise (God's rainbow covenant, inverted). 107k words. Next: editorial pass chapter by chapter — pronoun/name consistency, prose tightening, structural notes.

projects.name: AI Mix Platform
projects.description: End-to-end commercial audio production platform. Two tiers: full-service (Studio Awesome runs it) and self-serve (client runs it, SA available for QC). Full workflow: (1) Project scoping upfront — client declares ALL versions needed at the start (e.g., :60 TV + :30 TV + :15 TV + :30 radio); can upload multiple locked videos (one per length) if each version has its own edit; one project, multiple deliverables, no starting over; scope feeds directly into rate calculator for full budget before casting begins; (2) Script timing analysis — AI predicts clock time per script, flags if any version will run long before session is booked; (3) Select Casting integration — builds casting brief directly, usage/term answers auto-populate rate calculator; (4) Casting via Select Casting; (5) Recording — live at Studio Awesome, remote via Source Connect/Audiomovers, or self-recorded; (6) Video upload (locked picture per version) — AI analyzes visual cues (cuts, scene changes, product reveals) to suggest music and SFX placement at timecodes; (7) Licensed music + SFX library (Artlist/Epidemic Sound/Musicbed via API) — two-layer UI: (a) AI surfaces top 5 context-matched suggestions; (b) full browse mode — searchable/filterable catalog, client searches 'car crash' and auditions all 30 licensed results; everything auditionable in-context against their actual VO and video, not in isolation; all pre-cleared for commercial use; (8) AI mix — automated mix to picture per version, Dolby.io processing, natural language feedback loop; (9) Engineer handoff package if AI mix needs human touch: WAV stems at 48kHz/24-bit (Voice, SFX, Music separate), all source assets, notes doc (EQ, processing decisions); (10) Engineer exports approved mix back into platform; (11) AI versioning — approved mix generates market versions (swap tags, same mix); (12) QC + delivery. Moat: SA owns the casting platform (Select Casting) + the studio (1608 Argyle) — closed loop no competitor has. Josiah (SA business partner) confirmed engineer handoff spec + full feature review 2026-03-13.

projects.name: Select Casting AI — Casting Assistant + Rate Tool
projects.description: AI features embedded into the Select Casting platform (select-casting.com). Two primary areas: (1) CASTING BRIEF AI ASSIST — buyer uploads script(s), AI auto-fills: role names (adult and youth separated), number of roles, talent spec draft from character descriptions/tone in script, product type suggestion, usage type suggestion; AI does NOT auto-fill script timing (not relevant to casting); for Talent Budget field, a 'Our Recommendation' button above the field suggests a rate based on filled-in usage/market/term using SC real-world data (linked to rate calculator for full breakdown); buyer still enters their own number but gets a data anchor; AI asks clarifying questions for fields it cannot infer (union status, markets, due date); works for both VO and On-Camera forms; (2) AUDITION REVIEW AI ASSIST — team vote tracking is OPTIONAL (opt-in per project, off by default) — project owner enables

to invite stakeholders; AI surfaces consensus picks when enabled; audition tone tagging removed from scope; (3) TALENT AGENCY ROSTER MATCHING — when a brief comes in, AI scans agency roster and surfaces top 5-10 talent matches so agents don't manually scan; pre-generates audition sides from script (relevant lines, clean format); flags audition QC issues before agent submits (background noise, over-length takes); (4) RETURNING BUYER HISTORY — AI learns from a buyer's past castings to pre-fill defaults on new projects. No script timing analysis feature (belongs on AI Mix Platform only).
